scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build:admin && npm run build:api
scripts.install:all: npm run install:admin && npm run install:api
scripts.postbuild: cp -r admin/.next . && cp -r admin/public . && cp admin/package.json . || echo 'Ambiente Windows ou erro na copia'
scripts.start: if [ "$APP_TYPE" = "API" ]; then node api/dist/main.js; else next start; fi
